Description: Draft feature for trying local/open-source vision models on the available GPU.

Stories.StoryDescription: Assess candidate local vision models for embeddings, labeling, or grouping assistance.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has a shortlist of viable local model options and tradeoffs.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add an adapter boundary so local model support can be enabled without changing pipeline orchestration.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The codebase can plug in a local model behind a stable interface.
